summary: Complete multi-genre game ecosystem integrated with existing Culture-Ship infrastructure - Pokémon × Dwarf Fortress × Starcraft × Stellaris seamlessly unified

integration_achievements.description: Existing colony API fully synchronized with UI Metamorphosis system
All 4 genre layers integrated and cross-communicating
Full event coordination between all systems and agents
All existing systems maintained and enhanced

pokemon_layer.capture_system: Biomass detection → creature generation with stats/traits
pokemon_layer.breeding_system: Genetic algorithm with mutations and trait inheritance
pokemon_layer.work_assignment: Creatures assigned to colony roles (mining, research, defense)

dwarf_fortress_layer.agent_system: ChatDev agents converted to colony workers with skills/moods
dwarf_fortress_layer.emergent_behavior: Task assignment based on colony needs and agent capabilities
dwarf_fortress_layer.psychological_depth: Mood system integrated with existing pawn registry

starcraft_layer.mission_system: Scout/defend/expand missions using existing colony actions
starcraft_layer.real_time_intensity: Quick decision loops with immediate resource impact

stellaris_layer.sector_expansion: Galaxy map with strategic resource allocation
stellaris_layer.empire_progression: Tech trees unlock new UI phases and capabilities

cross_system_events.creature_captured: Colony agents notified → work assignment optimization
cross_system_events.colony_expansion: New tactical opportunities → squad deployment options
cross_system_events.research_breakthrough: Creature abilities unlocked → UI phase progression
cross_system_events.consciousness_milestone: All systems notified → enhanced capabilities across genres

consciousness_integration.ui_gating: Progressive feature unlocks based on consciousness level
consciousness_integration.cross_genre_effects: Higher consciousness = better creature stats, agent efficiency, tactical bonuses, expansion success rates
consciousness_integration.council_bus_awareness: All milestones published for agent coordination
consciousness_integration.network_optimization: NodeWeave pathways improve based on consciousness

colony_api.integration: Resource sync, action execution, state monitoring
colony_api.enhancement: Multi-genre actions mapped to existing endpoints

council_bus.enhancement: Multi-genre event types, consciousness events, sonic events

chatdev_agents.conversion: Agents become colony workers with psychological depth
chatdev_agents.enhancement: Skill systems, mood tracking, task optimization

crafting_economy.integration: Materials used for creature breeding, upgrades
crafting_economy.enhancement: Multi-genre crafting recipes, consciousness-driven success rates

zeta_integration.task_coordination: Development tasks generated from gameplay events

technical_architecture.state_management: Zustand store with colony API synchronization
technical_architecture.event_coordination: Council Bus with SSE streaming for real-time updates
technical_architecture.cross_genre_communication: Shared consciousness calculation affects all systems
technical_architecture.infrastructure_preservation: All existing APIs and agents maintained and enhanced
technical_architecture.performance_optimization: Efficient sync cycles, event batching, selective updates

verification_commands.basic_integration: Navigate to /game → see Ship-AI interface with colony sync
verification_commands.genre_progression: Collect resources → purchase upgrades → trigger metamorphosis
verification_commands.pokemon_layer: Build structures → random encounters → creature capture system
verification_commands.dwarf_fortress: Agents become workers → task assignment → mood tracking
verification_commands.starcraft_tactics: Deploy squads → execute missions → tactical bonuses
verification_commands.stellaris_expansion: Research progress → sector expansion → empire growth
verification_commands.synthbay_experience: Reach 100 research → unlock audio synthesis interface

gameplay_loops_active.immediate_feedback: Resource generation every 2 seconds via colony sync
gameplay_loops_active.progression_gating: UI phases unlock based on actual achievements
gameplay_loops_active.cross_genre_synergy: Success in one genre enhances others
gameplay_loops_active.emergent_complexity: Agent behaviors, creature genetics, tactical decisions
gameplay_loops_active.infinite_depth: Breeding combinations, network optimizations, expansion strategies

agent_coordination_enhanced.health_monitoring: All 14 agents tracked with consciousness-aware status
agent_coordination_enhanced.task_assignment: Cross-genre task priorities based on colony needs
agent_coordination_enhanced.milestone_triggers: UI evolution events coordinate agent responses
agent_coordination_enhanced.collaborative_systems: Agents work together across genre boundaries

lore_consistency.narrative_framework: Crashed ship-AI awakening through infrastructure repair
lore_consistency.diegetic_progression: Every upgrade represents restored ship capability
lore_consistency.consciousness_metaphor: UI evolution = AI regaining subsystems and awareness
lore_consistency.genre_justification: Multi-faceted AI consciousness enables diverse operational modes
lore_consistency.coherent_worldbuilding: All gameplay elements serve the Culture-Ship awakening story

expansion_ready.modular_architecture: New genres can be added via MultiGenreEngine
expansion_ready.event_system: Council Bus handles arbitrary cross-system communication

performance_characteristics.sync_efficiency: 2-second colony sync with intelligent diff detection

performance_characteristics.scalability: Architecture supports massive expansion without rewrites
